rising_definition.comparison: current value vs N bars ago (not slope)

long_entry.name: MTF Pyramid Pullback

conditions.code: rsi[i-lb] < 45 within 2 bars AND rsi[i] > rsi[i-1]
conditions.english: RSI dipped below 45 recently and is now recovering

long_entry.signal_behavior: Stateful: once 1.0, stays 1.0 until exit conditions

short_entry.name: EMA Crossover with Volume

conditions.english: Previous bar fast was above/equal slow (crossover moment)

exit_conditions.english: Fast EMA crosses back above slow EMA

short_entry.signal_behavior: Stateful: once -1.0, stays -1.0 until fast > slow

regime_transition_rule.english: Force close any open position on regime change

supertrend_15m.role: Long entry filter (condition 3) and near-band check (condition 4)

execution_model.execution: sig_idx = i - 1 (signal from previous bar determines current bar)
execution_model.implication: Pine alert fires on signal bar; bot executes on NEXT bar's open

ema_calculation.rust: SMA seed for first N bars, then k=2/(N+1) exponential smoothing

supertrend_direction_logic.rust: if prev_dir==-1 && close > prev_fd then 1; elif prev_dir==1 && close < prev_fu then -1; else prev_dir
supertrend_direction_logic.pine: ta.supertrend() — identical logic internally, returns -1 for bullish, +1 for bearish (inverted convention)

alignment_method.rust: align_htf: for each 15m bar, find most recent HTF bar where ts_hi[j+1] <= ts_lo[i]
alignment_method.pine: request.security with barmerge.lookahead_off — equivalent confirmed-bar alignment

audit_result: All parameters and formulas match. Indicator is faithful to backtest.

known_minor_differences.description: Pine recalculates from the chart's first available bar (typically ~20k bars on 15m). The Rust engine processes from the dataset start. With 200-period EMA this means the SMA seed covers different data. After the first ~400 bars of EMA convergence, values are identical. Impact: negligible on recent bars.

On a live chart, regime uses real-time close which changes intra-bar. The Rust engine uses confirmed bar closes only. Since alerts fire on bar close, the actual signal is identical. Visual display may flicker during the bar.

alerts.condition: HyperTrader Regime MTF v3 → Buy Signal (Long Entry)
alerts.message: {"secret": "[YOUR_SECRET]", "strategy": "BTC Regime MTF", "action": "buy", "symbol": "BTCUSDT.P", "price": "{{close}}", "message": "MTF Pyramid long entry — regime BULL"}

reconciler.on_startup: Check current Hyperliquid positions vs indicator state; warn if mismatch
reconciler.on_signal: Verify position opened/closed matches webhook action
reconciler.heartbeat: Every 15 minutes, confirm bot is running and connected

telegram_alerts: Trade closed (direction, asset, entry/exit price, P&L)
Regime change (asset, old regime → new regime)
